programme.title: Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: Four survivalists attempt 21 days in the Kalahari Desert. But as brutal starvation sets in, desperation forces the group to confront fractured trust, extreme choices, and the limits of human endurance.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Filthy Fortunes
programme.desc: At a hoard Matt's been circling for years, a genius inventor's pinball and jukebox collection could bring big sales -- but only if it's intact. Removing a 1980s waterbed costs time and money. Matt needs a hazmat suit to search a fridge marked as toxic.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid
programme.desc: Veteran survivalists Ky Furneaux and Dan Link take on their toughest challenge yet: surviving 14 days in Thailand with no tools at all, but when they can't ignite a fire, their challenge is quickly threatened.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.desc: Four survivalists attempt 21 days in the Kalahari Desert. But as brutal starvation sets in, desperation forces the group to confront fractured trust, extreme choices, and the limits of human endurance.

programme.desc: Veteran survivalists Ky Furneaux and Dan Link take on their toughest challenge yet: surviving 14 days in Thailand with no tools at all, but when they can't ignite a fire, their challenge is quickly threatened.

programme.title: Expedition From Hell: The Lost Tapes
programme.desc: A near-deadly case of dengue fever almost stops Mickey before he's arrested at gunpoint and imprisoned in Brazil; three months of missing footage leads to questions about his escape and the expedition's end.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water
programme.desc: Dustin Hurt makes a shocking and controversial decision; Kayla makes a desperate plea to double her chances at uncovering a life-changing pile of gold.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.sub-title: In the Eye of Hurricane Ida
programme.desc: As Hurricane Ida makes landfall, wildlife agents deploy to help the people of Louisiana; an injured woman is trapped in a flooded hotel; elderly neighbors await rescue in punishing conditions; lifesaving supplies must be delivered to those in need.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: In southern Louisiana, Lt. David Nunez and Sgt. Austin Arteaga investigate a group of bird hunters on opening day of teal season; a repeated offender is busted for taking immature crabs; a late-night deer decoy leads to a hunter in handcuffs.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: In Jackson Parish, a reckless hunter is investigated for shooting down a highway; agents stake out a man suspected of two illegal deer kills; duck hunters are confronted for harassment; a crowded boat parade ends with citations.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: As a storm rolls in over St. Tammany Parish, Cpl. Blaine Wagner and Cpl. Rick Clark assist in a search-and-rescue mission for a missing fisherman; agents confront a repeat offender for harassing hunters, and a felon is caught with an illegal firearm.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Louisiana Law
programme.desc: In Ouachita Parish, a trespassing investigation leads to a dicey encounter and multiple seizures of deer; agents confront a group of duck hunters who are spotted killing non-game birds; health code violations are found during a routine oyster patrol.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Caught!
programme.sub-title: It Seemed Like a Good Idea
programme.desc: A journey across America, where some stunts and moments unfold in unexpected places; adventures and escapades that redefine the boundaries of possibility.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Caught!
programme.desc: Shopping trips are part of everyone's daily routines, but if tensions flare between angry customers and fed-up workers, it can result in more than just damaged goods.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Caught!
programme.desc: Criminals try anything to avoid capture, but specially trained police use non-lethal methods to leave bad guys tased and confused; an officer risks life and limb atop a moving vehicle, and an escaped convict puts on the charm to avoid being captured.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Caught!
programme.desc: An adrenaline-fueled journey across the nation to dive into America's road adventures.

programme.title: Caught!
programme.desc: A wild journey of outrageous clips; near-miss car crashes, avalanche disasters and a terrifying, death-defying glider ride.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Caught!
programme.desc: People take advantage of every element, especially fire, water, ice, and air, when performing dangerous stunts and concocting crazy contraptions.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Caught!
programme.desc: Serving others is a noble cause, unless it's in the service industry; between bad customers and broken machines, it can be a total nightmare.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Caught!
programme.desc: Courtroom chaos caught on camera; if the judge's gavel isn't enough to calm down criminals, brave bailiffs and cops have to step in; shocking attacks, escape attempts, and stolen firearms make for a very dramatic day in court.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Caught!
programme.desc: Throughout history, thrill-seekers have dared to perform outrageous stunts and jeopardize their safety for glory; in modern times, it is internet virality that drives such individuals.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Caught!
programme.desc: Nature's creatures don't always stay in the wild; from four-legged intruders to thieving beasts, when animals and humans meet -- these feisty critters won't back down.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Contraband: Seized at the Airport
programme.desc: Officers get intelligence on a passenger heading to London carrying an illicit load; when questioned, the man says he's meeting with Braveheart; a shipment of high-end construction equipment throws up red flags when its quality looks shoddy.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Contraband: Seized at the Airport
programme.desc: Intel arrives, sending officers searching for two suspected narcotics smugglers flying in from London; agriculture specialists get more than they bargained for when a passenger lands with some illegal and foul-smelling items.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Contraband: Seized at the Airport
programme.desc: An agriculture dog alerts to a suitcase coming from Ethiopia, and inspection reveals a tough hide. A plain-clothes officer in baggage claim finds a passenger acting suspiciously. A woman from Japan accuses officers of assuming she's a prostitute.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Contraband: Seized at the Airport
programme.desc: Officers grow suspicious of a traveler who is about to board his second flight within 24 hours to and from Canada. After closer inspection, a traveler claiming to have arrived in the U.S. for a solo vacation appears to have lied on his visa application.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Contraband: Seized at the Airport
programme.desc: A Scottish teenager claims that he's come to meet his girlfriend from a gaming website; when a couple arrives with a large amount of cash split into bundles, officers dig deeper and see that the man is under investigation by the FBI.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Body Cam
programme.desc: Officers chase a suspect, attend a car fire, and detain a homicide suspect.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: 120 Hours Behind Bars
programme.desc: In Bristol County Jail, half of the cells don't lock. As changing demographics bring in more violent, gang-affiliated criminals, staff must manage a higher-risk population without the facility slipping into chaos.

programme.title: Contraband: Seized at the Airport
programme.desc: A traveler claims he's shocked by the discovery of a firearm in his luggage; officers question a luxury fountain pen maker; her story of coming to the U.S. for a vacation raises suspicions that she may be planning to work while she's here.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue With Freddy & Juan
programme.desc: In California, a miner with 75 cents in the bank faces ruin at his failing hard-rock mine; when a pivot to placer mining fails, Freddy makes an incredible discovery, and Juan builds their first-ever hard-rock mill hammer system to save this desperate dad.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue With Freddy & Juan
programme.desc: Gold Rush legend Dave Turin joins Juan in Alaska for an impossible mission: a full plant rebuild. In one of their most epic challenges yet, the duo faces a major setback while turning a mining family's in-laws' hobby plant into a lasting legacy.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue With Freddy & Juan
programme.desc: With a family facing ruin, setbacks and soaring debt on their BC mine, it's up to Juan and prospecting experts Jeff and Sophia Bond to save them; using 6,000 pounds of steel, Juan creates his largest-ever hopper build to get a massive gold increase.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Gold Rush: Mine Rescue With Freddy & Juan
programme.desc: Freddy and Juan get an SOS from a group of young miners in Montana after they go $1M into debt with no gold to show for it; facing nonstop breakdowns and a crew mutiny, the guys must resurrect a 60-year-old conveyor and divide forces to save this plant.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: When neighbors send a plea for help, the Raneys rush to rescue a lone Montana homesteader; with winter bearing down upon them, they must build a survival strategy from scratch to secure shelter, water and food before it's too late.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.sub-title: Raney Returns: Back to Black Hills
programme.desc: The Black family thrived after their rescue three years ago, but success has brought with it new, overwhelming issues; Marty returns to the Black Hills to help them battle the elements as they rebuild to protect against inclement weather.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: The Raneys mark the milestone of 100 rescues with a look back at their most unforgettable homesteads. From wild transformations to fan-favorite families, they revisit it all, even answering viewers' most-asked social media questions.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: A Colorado family's dream of self-sufficiency is crumbling under the destructiveness of their bison herd; to supply the ranch with food and water, the Raneys must first tame the chaos and build a path to true self-sustainability.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: After a devastating earthquake, Marty saves the Hartleys' log cabin from crumbling to the ground; Misty replaces a collapsed greenhouse; Matt constructs a brand new building for the family to start a diesel engine repair shop.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
